summary: Comprehensive e2e QA testing of United Rehabs website. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: 'Get Help Now' buttons (header and footer) have NO onClick handler - clicking does nothing. All other functionality working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Button has no onClick handler. Clicking does nothing.
ui_bugs.fix: Add onClick handler to navigate to help resources or open modal with crisis info

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Button has no onClick handler. Clicking does nothing.
ui_bugs.fix: Add onClick handler to navigate to help resources or open modal with crisis info

action_items: CRITICAL: Add onClick handler to 'Get Help Now' button in Header.tsx (line 88) - either navigate to /contact or open modal with 988/SAMHSA crisis info
CRITICAL: Add onClick handler to 'Get Help Now' button in Footer.tsx (line 315) - same behavior as header button
critical_code_review_comments: Header.tsx line 88: <Button> has no onClick - should navigate to help or open crisis modal
Footer.tsx line 315: <Button> has no onClick - should navigate to help or open crisis modal
Suggested fix: onClick={() => window.location.href = 'tel:988'} or onClick={() => navigate('/contact')}

success_rate.frontend: 95% - only Get Help Now buttons not working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Get Help Now button bug confirmed in Header.tsx (line 88) and Footer.tsx (line 315). All other features working: search, navigation, consent modals, admin login, state/country pages, compare page, treatment centers, mobile responsiveness.

get_help_now_header.details: Button exists but has no onClick handler - clicking does nothing

get_help_now_footer.details: Button exists but has no onClick handler - clicking does nothing

search_bar.details: Autocomplete works, navigation to location pages works

navigation_menu.details: All nav links work: Compare, Treatment Centers, Blog, About, Contact

locations_dropdown.details: Mega menu opens on hover showing US states by region and 195 countries

cookie_consent_banner.details: Accept All, Essential Only, and Cookie Settings buttons visible and working

disclaimer_consent_modal.details: Modal appears, checkboxes work, Continue button enables when both checked

crisis_hotline_banner.details: 988 link (tel:988) and SAMHSA link (tel:1-800-662-4357) both working

contact_form.details: Form loads with Name, Email, Subject, Message fields. Submit button present.

california_state_page.details: Page loads with stats, maps, treatment center filters

florida_state_page.details: Page loads correctly with Florida-specific data

germany_country_page.details: Page loads with Germany flag, Key Statistics 2025, Historical Trends

compare_page.details: Shows US, UK, Germany comparison with charts. Add/remove countries working.

treatment_centers_page.details: Shows 104 centers with filters (country, type). Featured cards with ratings.

admin_login.details: Login successful with provided credentials. Dashboard shows stats.

mobile_responsiveness.details: Mobile menu hamburger works, Get Help Now visible, search bar accessible

footer_scroll_to_top.details: Back to Top button present in footer

rca_of_issue.bug: Get Help Now button not working
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Button component in Header.tsx (line 88) and Footer.tsx (line 315) has no onClick handler attached
reproduction_steps: 3. Click 'Get Help Now' button in header or footer
4. Observe: Nothing happens - no navigation, no modal, no action
rca_of_issue.expected_behavior: Button should either: (a) navigate to contact/help page, (b) open modal with 988/SAMHSA crisis info, or (c) call crisis number directly
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Add onClick handler: onClick={() => window.location.href = 'tel:988'} or use navigate to crisis resources page
